basics.name: KyeongKook Seo (서경국)
basics.label: Ph.D. Student in Artificial Intelligence
basics.summary: Ph.D. student in the Lab of Advanced Imaging Technology (LAIT), AIGS, UNIST, advised by Prof. Jaejun Yoo. Research interests include generative models, federated learning, safety AI, loss landscape geometry, and weight-space learning.

education.institution: Ulsan National Institute of Science and Technology (UNIST)
education.summary: Advisor: Prof. Jaejun Yoo, Lab of Advanced Imaging Technology (LAIT).

publications.name: Understanding Flatness in Generative Models: Its Role and Benefits

publications.name: What Linear Probes Miss: Multi-View Probing for Weight-Space Learning
publications.summary: E. Heo, K. Seo, and J. Yoo. ICML 2026, Vancouver (Poster).
